queries: إِنَّ الَّذِينَ جَاءُوا بِالْإِفْكِ عُصْبَةٌ مِّنكُمْ لَا تَحْسَبُوهُ شَرًّا لَّكُم بَلْ هُوَ خَيْرٌ لَّكُمْ لِكُلِّ امْرِئٍ مِّنْهُمْ مَا اكْتَسَبَ مِنَ الْإِثْمِ وَالَّذِي تَوَلَّى كِبْرَهُ مِنْهُمْ لَهُ عَذَابٌ عَظِيمٌ
وَلَوْلَا إِذْ سَمِعْتُمُوهُ قُلْتُم مَّا يَكُونُ لَنَا أَن نَّتَكَلَّمَ بِهَذَا سُبْحَانَكَ هَذَا بُهْتَانٌ عَظِيمٌ

action.query: كان رسول الله إذا أراد سفراً أقرع بين نسائه فأيتهن خرج سهمها خرج بها معه حديث صحيح البخاري

output.code:
# Let's parse the text and find all quoted segments using double quotes.
text_path = "/mnt/data/file-FNW3RaW6fek1FX8XqvxhUS-Q043.txt"
with open(text_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()

# Find indices of the double quote character "
quote_positions = [i for i, ch in enumerate(text) if ch == '"']
len(text), quote_positions[:10], len(quote_positions)

# Extract segments for each pair
pairs = list(zip(quote_positions[::2], quote_positions[1::2]))
segments = [{"span_start": s, "span_end": e+1, "span_text": text[s:e+1]} for s,e in pairs]
segments, len(segments)

citations = []
for s,e in pairs:
    inner_start = s + 1
    inner_end = e  # exclusive
    inner_text = text[inner_start:inner_end]
    citations.append((inner_start, inner_end, inner_text))
citations

# Build the citations list with required schema fields.
text = text  # from file already
# Use previously computed 'citations' list for first 3, plus hadith for the last open quote.

# 1: 24:11

    "span_start": citations[0][0],
    "span_end": citations[0][1],
    "span_text": citations[0][2],
    "citation_type": "Aya",
    "is_valid": True,
    "aya_reference": {"sura_name": "النور", "sura_number": 24, "aya_number": 11},
    "hadeeth_reference": {},

    "completely_invalid": False
})
# 2: 24:16
entries.append({
    "span_start": citations[1][0],
    "span_end": citations[1][1],
    "span_text": citations[1][2],
    "citation_type": "Aya",
    "is_valid": True,
    "aya_reference": {"sura_name": "النور", "sura_number": 24, "aya_number": 16},
    "hadeeth_reference": {},
    "corrected_text": "وَلَوْلَآ إِذْ سَمِعْتُمُوهُ قُلْتُم مَّا يَكُونُ لَنَآ أَن نَّتَكَلَّمَ بِهَـٰذَا سُبْحَـٰنَكَ هَـٰذَا بُهْتَـٰنٌ عَظِيمٌۭ",
    "completely_invalid": False
})
# 3: 24:19
entries.append({
    "span_start": citations[2][0],
    "span_end": citations[2][1],
    "span_text": citations[2][2],
    "citation_type": "Aya",
    "is_valid": True,
    "aya_reference": {"sura_name": "النور", "sura_number": 24, "aya_number": 19},
    "hadeeth_reference": {},
    "corrected_text": "إِنَّ الَّذِينَ يُحِبُّونَ أَنْ تَشِيعَ الْفَاحِشَةُ فِي الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا لَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ ۚ وَاللَّهُ يَعْلَمُ وَأَنْتُمْ لَا تَعْلَمُونَ",
    "completely_invalid": False
})
# 4: Hadith block
entries.append({
    "span_start": open_quote_index+1,
    "span_end": len(text),
    "span_text": text[open_quote_index+1:],
    "citation_type": "Hadeeth",
    "is_valid": False,
    "aya_reference": {},
    "hadeeth_reference": {"collection_name": "Sahih Bukhari", "book_number": 51, "hadith_number": 2593},
    "corrected_text": "حَدَّثَنَا حِبَّانُ بْنُ مُوسَى، أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ، أَخْبَرَنَا يُونُسُ، عَنِ الزُّهْرِيِّ، عَنْ عُرْوَةَ، عَنْ عَائِشَةَ ـ رضى الله عنها ـ قَالَتْ كَانَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم إِذَا أَرَادَ سَفَرًا أَقْرَعَ بَيْنَ نِسَائِهِ، فَأَيَّتُهُنَّ خَرَجَ سَهْمُهَا خَرَجَ بِهَا مَعَهُ، وَكَانَ يَقْسِمُ لِكُلِّ امْرَأَةٍ مِنْهُنَّ يَوْمَهَا وَلَيْلَتَهَا، غَيْرَ أَنَّ سَوْدَةَ بِنْتَ زَمْعَةَ وَهَبَتْ يَوْمَهَا وَلَيْلَتَهَا، لِعَائِشَةَ زَوْجِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم تَبْتَغِي بِذَلِكَ رِضَا رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم‏.",
    "completely_invalid": False
})

# Package final JSON
output = {"citations": entries}
import json
json.dumps(output, ensure_ascii=False)[:1000]

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
